brand_voice_note: Nautical and warm, pairing vivid roast-to-order flavor storytelling with sincere veteran-owned, give-back purpose.

concepts.product_title: SS JOHN W BROWN Liberty Roast
concepts.primary_text:
This one honors the ship that carried the crews home.

Liberty Roast is our darkest pour, named for the SS John W Brown, all smoke and dark-chocolate depth for the deep watch when you want coffee with some weight behind it. Small-batch roasted to order so it lands in your hands fresh.

10% of every SS John W Brown bag sails to Project Liberty Ship. Drink Coffee & Do Good, and set sail with Salty Sailor.
concepts.headline: A Dark Roast With History
concepts.why_it_works: The Liberty Ship name carries real story and a specific 10% donation, so the founder angle turns heritage and mission into a reason to choose this exact roast.

concepts.primary_text:
Pour yourself the dessert course. ☕

Phantom Pecan leads with warm, toasted pecan, then opens into that sweet-and-savory pecan pie character that lingers like a well-earned watch ending. Nutty, smooth, and a little indulgent.

Roasted to order so it lands in your hands fresh. The brew for slow mornings and the after-supper cup.
concepts.headline: The After-Supper Cup
concepts.why_it_works: A flavored dessert coffee sells on craving, so leading with the indulgent pecan-pie payoff hits the exact feeling that makes someone add it to cart.
